title: Split-Action Lock
subtitle: Sandbox E
intro: Verify the 2021 turn-shape rule: you may MOVE-then-ACT or ACT-then-MOVE, but you may NOT split (move part, act, finish moving). Wizard starts with a Staff and 8 MP rolled. A goblin sits two squares west. Walk one square, attack the goblin (your action lands AFTER moving) — the move counter should now show '(locked — acted after moving)' and any further click on a destination should be ignored. End turn and on the next turn try the reverse: ATTACK the second goblin first (no movement yet), then walk anywhere — the label should switch to '(act-first; movement still available)'.

objective.text: Slay both goblins. Test split-lock on the first; act-first-still-move on the second.
